claim_boundary.next_gate: A future PR must satisfy CM-01 through CM-08 or produce 30 occurrence-removing certificates before any B7 resource delta can be counted.
claim_boundary.supported_claim: A physical theta-sharing cost model is not acceptable under the current evidence; the optimistic 620 proxy-T cache signal remains an unaccepted proposal signal.
unsupported_claims: No physical shared-theta synthesis object is defined.
No occurrence-removing semantic certificates are produced.
No layout, factory, or error-budget ledger accepts theta sharing.
No B7 min-row resource improvement is counted.

cost_model_acceptance_gates.failure_reason: Current evidence has 0 accepted occurrence removals.
cost_model_acceptance_gates.requirement: At least 30 replayable occurrence-removing semantic certificates.

cost_model_acceptance_gates.failure_reason: No physical shared-theta synthesis object is defined.
cost_model_acceptance_gates.requirement: A shared synthesis object that replaces repeated theta occurrences, not only a classical template label.
A replay verifier for the shared-theta object across all affected windows.

cost_model_acceptance_gates.failure_reason: No physical layout or routing path is supplied.
cost_model_acceptance_gates.requirement: An explicit layout/routing model showing where the shared object lives and how windows consume it.

cost_model_acceptance_gates.failure_reason: No factory-throughput or amortization ledger is supplied.
cost_model_acceptance_gates.requirement: A factory-amortization model proving lower T-factory pressure under the shared object.

cost_model_acceptance_gates.failure_reason: No shared-error or correlation budget is supplied.
cost_model_acceptance_gates.requirement: A synthesis-error and correlation budget for shared theta reuse.

cost_model_acceptance_gates.failure_reason: No independent physical baseline separates cache labels from occurrence cost.
cost_model_acceptance_gates.requirement: An independent baseline showing cache-only accounting is not double-counting occurrence cost.

cost_model_acceptance_gates.failure_reason: No refreshed B7 ledger accepts theta sharing as a physical saving.
cost_model_acceptance_gates.requirement: A refreshed B7 FT ledger that accepts the model and improves the gcm_h6 min row.

title: B1/B7 cone_01 theta-sharing physical cost-model gate
